The '''Rock Beetle Refuge''' was an area in the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] where a large population of [[rock beetle]]s lived. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]] hired a spacer to go to this location in order to kill several rock beetles and bring him their carcasses to cook [[beetle broth]] for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]].<ref name="SWG:JPP" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Rock Beetle Refuge was a location in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:JPP" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Rock Beetle Refuge was added to the game as part of the revamped "[[W:c:swg:Jabba's Theme Park|Jabba's Theme Park]],"<ref name="SWG:JPP" /> released with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
